title: Assess land use applications for legislative compliance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assess land use applications for legislative compliance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for assessment

pcs.text: Review and confirm data for suitability of application for changes in land use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and confirm data for suitability of application for changes in land use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and confirm data for suitability of application for changes in land use.

pcs.text: Communicate with client intention to process application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with client intention to process application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with client intention to process application.

pcs.text: Confirm land ownership by undertaking a title search
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm land ownership by undertaking a title search?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm land ownership by undertaking a title search.

pcs.text: Notify client of irregularities in application according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify client of irregularities in application according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify client of irregularities in application according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Establish timing of inspection and data collection with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish timing of inspection and data collection with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish timing of inspection and data collection with client.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for assessment

elements.title: Collect site evidence

pcs.text: Check accuracy of submitted site plans against known mapping data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check accuracy of submitted site plans against known mapping data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check accuracy of submitted site plans against known mapping data.

pcs.text: Investigate and collect site data pertinent to the application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and collect site data pertinent to the application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and collect site data pertinent to the application.

pcs.text: Investigate and assess threats to biota and biodiversity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and assess threats to biota and biodiversity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and assess threats to biota and biodiversity.

pcs.text: Assess impact of proposed land use on soil and water conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess impact of proposed land use on soil and water conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess impact of proposed land use on soil and water conditions.

pcs.text: Investigate and record potential cultural and heritage issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and record potential cultural and heritage issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and record potential cultural and heritage issues.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Collect site evidence

elements.title: Compile final report

pcs.text: Assess site evidence and application data against criteria according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess site evidence and application data against criteria according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess site evidence and application data against criteria according to workplace procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document outcomes of assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document outcomes of assessment.

pcs.text: Compile a report and recommendations in accordance with legislative and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile a report and recommendations in accordance with legislative and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile a report and recommendations in accordance with legislative and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Present final report and supporting documentation to stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present final report and supporting documentation to stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present final report and supporting documentation to stakeholders.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Compile final report

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
